menu.name: Paneer Tikka Masala
menu.description: Charcoal-grilled cottage cheese in a rich, spiced tomato gravy.

menu.name: Garlic Butter Naan
menu.description: Tandoor-baked flatbread brushed with garlic-infused butter.

menu.name: Awadhi Biryani
menu.description: Fragrant basmati rice slow-cooked with aromatic spices and tender vegetables.

menu.name: Honey Chilli Potato
menu.description: Crispy potato fingers tossed in a sweet and spicy sesame glaze.

menu.name: Truffle Mushroom Pasta
menu.description: Penne in a creamy wild mushroom sauce with a hint of truffle oil.

menu.name: Death by Chocolate
menu.description: Decadent dark chocolate shake topped with brownie chunks and fudge.

reviews.text: The Honey Chilli Potato is out of this world! The ambiance makes it the perfect spot for family dinners in Kanpur.
reviews.author: Rahul S.

reviews.text: Impeccable hygiene and incredible taste. You can tell they cook everything fresh. The Paneer Tikka melts in your mouth.
reviews.author: Priya M.

reviews.text: Best combination of traditional North Indian and continental food. The shakes are legendary indeed!
reviews.author: Amit K.
